notes: Round-3 labeling.py ablation #3: sub 33 + per-benchmark logit-space shift fit from labeled[]. For each benchmark with >=2 labels, ridge LAMBDA_BM=5 toward 0, capped +/-0.5; benchmarks with <2 labels fall back to a global shift (LAMBDA=25). Hypothesis: F2 residuals are per-benchmark, so localized shifts recover more signal than the single global shift at the cost of higher variance per cell. No labeling.py (random platform fallback).
